name: wilson-gpu
description: Rented-GPU cost guardrail + lifecycle for RunPod / Vast.ai. SessionStart surfaces every still-billing instance (uptime + estimated cost so far) so a forgotten pod never leaks money; /wilson-gpu is the kill switch (down) and wires an instance straight into the wilson-pool roster (attach). Provisioning (up) is a SEPARATE switch, OFF by default — `up` needs provisioning ON *and* --yes (double gate on the money action). Inert unless `runpodctl` / `vastai` is on PATH. Opt out: SIDECAR_NO_GPU=1.
